# browser

```go
import "github.com/pkg/browser"
```

Package browser provides helpers to open files, readers, and urls in a browser window.

The choice of which browser is started is entirely client dependant.

## Index

- [Variables](<#variables>)
- [func OpenFile\(path string\) error](<#OpenFile>)
- [func OpenReader\(r io.Reader\) error](<#OpenReader>)
- [func OpenURL\(url string\) error](<#OpenURL>)

## Variables

<a name="Stderr"></a>Stderr is the io.Writer to which executed commands write standard error.

```go
var Stderr io.Writer = os.Stderr
```

<a name="Stdout"></a>Stdout is the io.Writer to which executed commands write standard output.

```go
var Stdout io.Writer = os.Stdout
```

<a name="OpenFile"></a>

## func [OpenFile](<https://github.com/pkg/browser/blob/master/browser.go#L22>)

```go
func OpenFile(path string) error
```

OpenFile opens new browser window for the file path.

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

```go
OpenFile("index.html")
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="OpenReader"></a>

## func [OpenReader](<https://github.com/pkg/browser/blob/master/browser.go#L32>)

```go
func OpenReader(r io.Reader) error
```

OpenReader consumes the contents of r and presents the results in a new browser window.

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

```go
// https://github.com/rust-lang/rust/issues/13871
const quote = `There was a night when winds from unknown spaces
whirled us irresistibly into limitless vacum beyond all thought and entity.
Perceptions of the most maddeningly untransmissible sort thronged upon us;
perceptions of infinity which at the time convulsed us with joy, yet which
are now partly lost to my memory and partly incapable of presentation to others.`
r := strings.NewReader(quote)
OpenReader(r)
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="OpenURL"></a>

## func [OpenURL](<https://github.com/pkg/browser/blob/master/browser.go#L48>)

```go
func OpenURL(url string) error
```

OpenURL opens a new browser window pointing to url.

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

```go
const url = "http://golang.org/"
OpenURL(url)
```

</p>
</details>

# Open

```go
import "github.com/pkg/browser/examples/Open"
```

Open is a simple example of the github.com/pkg/browser package.

Usage:

```
# Open a file in a browser window
Open $FILE

# Open a URL in a browser window
Open $URL

# Open the contents of stdin in a browser window
cat $SOMEFILE | Open
```
